title: Event Manager
description: An Event Manager in India plans, coordinates, and executes events such as weddings, corporate events, and festivals. They work with clients to understand their requirements, create event concepts, and manage logistics, vendors, and timelines. They also handle event promotion, ticketing, and ensure smooth execution on the day of the event.
degree_name: Bachelor of Arts in Event Management
top_govt_colleges: National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Delhi
Indian Institute of Art and Design (IIAD) New Delhi
top_private_colleges: Srishti Institute of Art, Design and Technology Bangalore
Apeejay Institute of Design New Delhi

career_progression.year_0_2: Assistant Event Manager, Event Coordinator, Junior Marketing Executive
career_progression.year_3_5: Event Manager, Senior Marketing Executive, Brand Manager
career_progression.year_6_10: Senior Event Manager, Marketing Manager, Business Development Manager
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Start an event management company, create a mobile app for event ticketing, or develop an event planning software
career_progression.global_pathway: Work in international event management companies, join global event planning firms, or start an event management business in foreign countries

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Starting salary is low, but opportunities for growth are high
common_misconceptions: Event management is only about planning parties
Event managers are only required for large events
